goal: Land the CodeGraphContext (G4 Architecture) external MCP plugin manifest as a SOLO feature per DEC-0019 — establishes the new `architecture.*` capability namespace, reuses the clean F08 work from the archived feat/WO-0071 branch via cherry-pick, omits all F10/graphiti scope.
plan_summary: Re-emit P3-W9-F08 alone per DEC-0019 §4 (`feature_ids: ["P3-W9-F08"]` only — graphiti deferred to Phase 7 hardening). Cherry-pick the four clean F08 commits from feat/WO-0071 (`1d52a3f` manifest, `39850a1` g4 test suite + install script, `b23bdfe` verify script, `e5f10bb` verify script fix) onto a fresh feat/WO-0072 branch from main, EXCLUDING `9953a0f` (DEC-0019 spurious-frame drain — deferred to Phase 7) and the unwritten DEC-0019-attempt-2 ADR / `12a705d` RFR. Re-run all acceptance from the cherry-picked state, write a NEW RFR for WO-0072 referencing DEC-0019, file the fresh RFR. Apply the WO-0067/0068/0069/0070 mature-mutation-contract pattern (M1 transport.command poison, M2 expected-tool-name regression, M3 transport.args structural poison) — only one test exists for F08 so all three Mn target the SAME `g4_plugin_manifests::codegraphcontext_manifest_health_check` selector via different sites. F08 attempts=2; this attempt MUST land cleanly to avoid escalation trigger #1 (3-strike feature-rejection halt).
scope_in: 1. Cherry-pick mechanic. Create the worktree branch `feat/WO-0072-codegraphcontext-plugin-manifest` from CURRENT main (HEAD `acc4d95` or later). Cherry-pick exactly four commits from `feat/WO-0071-graphiti-and-codegraphcontext-plugin-manifests` IN ORDER: `1d52a3f` (codegraphcontext manifest), `39850a1` (g4 test suite + install-codegraphcontext-mcp.sh), `b23bdfe` (verify script), `e5f10bb` (verify script fix). DO NOT cherry-pick `9953a0f` (the DEC-0019-deferred drain-spurious-frames daemon code change) NOR `12a705d` (the WO-0071 retry-2 RFR — this WO writes a fresh RFR). After cherry-pick, the new branch must contain ONLY: `plugins/architecture/codegraphcontext/plugin.toml`, `crates/ucil-daemon/tests/g4_plugin_manifests.rs`, `scripts/devtools/install-codegraphcontext-mcp.sh`, and the rewritten `scripts/verify/P3-W9-F08.sh` — no F10/graphiti changes, no daemon source changes.

2. Sanity audit post-cherry-pick. Confirm `git diff main feat/WO-0072-codegraphcontext-plugin-manifest -- crates/ucil-daemon/src/` returns empty (NO daemon source changes — the spurious-frame-drain code change from `9953a0f` MUST NOT be in this WO; it ships in Phase 7 per DEC-0019). Confirm `git diff main feat/WO-0072-codegraphcontext-plugin-manifest -- plugins/knowledge/graphiti/` returns empty (NO graphiti manifest). Confirm `git diff main feat/WO-0072-codegraphcontext-plugin-manifest -- scripts/devtools/install-graphiti-mcp.sh scripts/verify/P3-W9-F10.sh` returns empty. Confirm `git diff main feat/WO-0072-codegraphcontext-plugin-manifest -- ucil-build/decisions/` returns empty (DEC-0019-attempt-2 ADR was forbidden_paths violation; do not re-introduce). If ANY of these audits fail, abort and re-do the cherry-pick.

3. Update commit-message trailers in the cherry-picked commits via `git commit --amend` ONLY before push. Each cherry-picked commit's body should retain `Phase: 3` and `Feature: P3-W9-F08` but update `Work-order: WO-0071` → `Work-order: WO-0072`. This is permissible because the commits have not yet been pushed under the new branch's upstream (the prior pushes were under feat/WO-0071, a different ref). Do NOT amend after push under feat/WO-0072. If amending all four feels noisy, accept the WO-0071 trailers and document in the RFR — the substantive provenance is preserved either way; critic precedent at WO-0067 accepts trailer carryover when work is preserved across WOs.

4. Re-validate acceptance from the cherry-picked HEAD. Run each of the AC criteria below in order on the freshly-pushed feat branch. Specifically: (a) `cargo test -p ucil-daemon --test g4_plugin_manifests g4_plugin_manifests::codegraphcontext_manifest_health_check` must exit 0 with `1 passed; 0 failed`; (b) `bash scripts/verify/P3-W9-F08.sh` must exit 0 (with `UCIL_SKIP_ARCHITECTURE_PLUGIN_E2E` unset — the tool-level dep-graph smoke MUST run end-to-end against `tests/fixtures/rust-project` copied into a tmpdir per `e5f10bb` fix); (c) `cargo clippy -p ucil-daemon -- -D warnings` exits 0; (d) `cargo fmt --all -- --check` exits 0; (e) `cargo test --workspace --no-fail-fast` exits 0 (subject to `models::test_coderankembed_inference` artefact-gating per WO-0068 lessons §verifier — pre-install via `bash scripts/devtools/install-coderankembed.sh` if not yet done in the executor session env).

5. M1 mutation (transport.command poison). Pre-mutation: `md5sum plugins/architecture/codegraphcontext/plugin.toml > /tmp/wo-0072-codegraphcontext-orig.md5`. Mutation: edit `plugins/architecture/codegraphcontext/plugin.toml` and replace `command = "uvx"` with `command = "/__ucil_test_nonexistent_M1__"`. Selector: `cargo test -p ucil-daemon --test g4_plugin_manifests g4_plugin_manifests::codegraphcontext_manifest_health_check`. Expected panic: a `PluginError::Spawn { source: Os { code: 2, kind: NotFound } }` chain (or analogous `tokio::process::Command::spawn` ENOENT-class error). Restore: `git checkout -- plugins/architecture/codegraphcontext/plugin.toml`. Confirm: `md5sum -c /tmp/wo-0072-codegraphcontext-orig.md5` returns OK. Mirror the WO-0069 M1/M2 transport.command-poison pattern verbatim.

6. M2 mutation (expected-tool-name regression). Pre-mutation: `md5sum crates/ucil-daemon/tests/g4_plugin_manifests.rs > /tmp/wo-0072-g4tests-orig.md5`. Mutation: edit the test file and replace whichever string the test asserts as the canonical CodeGraphContext tool name (likely `"analyze_code_relationships"` per the cherry-picked manifest's advertised tool list — confirm by reading the test BEFORE picking the literal — the executor's existing `39850a1` commit selects this tool from upstream's `tools/list`) with `"NON_EXISTENT_TOOL_M2"`. Selector: same. Expected: structured panic carrying the full live tool-list (`got: ["add_code_to_graph", "analyze_code_relationships", "find_code", ...]`). Restore: `git checkout -- crates/ucil-daemon/tests/g4_plugin_manifests.rs`. Confirm via md5.

7. M3 mutation (transport.args structural poison) — ALTERNATE site, distinct from M1. Mutation: edit `plugins/architecture/codegraphcontext/plugin.toml` and replace the `args = ["--with", "falkordblite", "codegraphcontext@0.4.7", "mcp", "start"]` line by removing the `--with falkordblite` pair (i.e., `args = ["codegraphcontext@0.4.7", "mcp", "start"]`). This is load-bearing per the `1d52a3f` commit body — without `--with falkordblite` the embedded FalkorDB-Lite store is unavailable and the upstream MCP server's startup fails (the manifest's leading comment block calls this out explicitly). Selector: same. Expected: a tools/list timeout / error chain (the upstream binary either errors during init or hangs; the test's `FIRST_RUN_TIMEOUT_MS=90000` and `health_check_with_timeout` envelope catch either). Restore: `git checkout -- plugins/architecture/codegraphcontext/plugin.toml`. Confirm via md5. Rationale: M3 must hit a DIFFERENT failure mode than M1+M2 to qualify as a substantive third mutation — M1 hits transport.spawn, M2 hits the tool-name assertion site, M3 hits the upstream server's runtime initialization. Cite the WO-0069 §planner #1 mutation-diversity intent; the manifest's leading comment block declares this `--with` invariant which itself is a load-bearing fact worth a regression test.

8. Cherry-pick chain integrity. After cherry-pick, the four commit subject lines on feat/WO-0072 should be: `feat(plugins/architecture): land codegraphcontext MCP manifest at v0.4.7`, `test(daemon): add g4 plugin manifest health-check suite (codegraphcontext)`, `test(verify): replace P3-W9-F08 stub with codegraphcontext acceptance`, `fix(verify/P3-W9-F08): copy fixture to tmpdir + use correct query_type`. Plus one new RFR commit at the end. The total commit count on feat ahead of main: 5 (4 cherry-picked + 1 RFR).

9. Pre-flight launcher-on-PATH check. Before pushing, run `command -v uvx` AND `command -v python3` — both must resolve. The codegraphcontext MCP server requires `uvx` to install/launch; the verify script's tool-level smoke section requires `python3` for JSON validation. If `uvx` is missing, run `bash scripts/devtools/install-codegraphcontext-mcp.sh` which has the `MISSING` branch printing the exact install command. WO-0069 §verifier #2 carries: missing launchers produce false-positive `PluginError::Spawn { kind: NotFound }` masking real M1 detection.

10. Pinned-immutable-tag policy. Confirm `! grep -qE '"(main|latest|master|head|develop|dev|nightly)"' plugins/architecture/codegraphcontext/plugin.toml` returns empty. The cherry-picked manifest pins `codegraphcontext@0.4.7` per `1d52a3f` — confirm the pin is intact post-cherry-pick.

11. Word-ban scrub. Confirm `! grep -qiE 'mock|fake|stub' plugins/architecture/codegraphcontext/plugin.toml scripts/devtools/install-codegraphcontext-mcp.sh scripts/verify/P3-W9-F08.sh` returns empty. The integration-test file `crates/ucil-daemon/tests/g4_plugin_manifests.rs` MAY contain the word `Mocking` only inside a forbidden-pattern declaration `//!` rustdoc per WO-0048 line 363 + WO-0069 §executor carve-out for `#[cfg(test)]` test-side rustdoc. Verify via reading the file post-cherry-pick.

12. Module-coherence per DEC-0005 applies to the cherry-picked commits only. Each cherry-picked commit is already DEC-0005-compliant from its WO-0071 origin (single cohesive change per commit, ~150 LOC each). Do NOT re-split or re-combine.

13. §15.2 tracing spans do NOT apply — this WO ships data files (manifest TOML), integration tests, helper scripts, and a verify script. NO new orchestration code, NO new `#[tracing::instrument]` annotations. Cite WO-0067 §planner #2 (pure-data-only modules: §15.2 tracing does NOT apply).

14. Frozen-test placement (DEC-0007). The cherry-picked test in `crates/ucil-daemon/tests/g4_plugin_manifests.rs` lives inside `mod g4_plugin_manifests { ... }` at module root with `#[tokio::test] async fn`. Substring selector resolves to `g4_plugin_manifests::codegraphcontext_manifest_health_check`. WO-0068 §planner #1 carry: frozen-test selector REQUIRES module-root placement (NOT under `mod tests { ... }`).

15. DEC-0019 reference. The new RFR commit body MUST cite DEC-0019 explicitly in the form: `Re-emits P3-W9-F08 alone per DEC-0019 §4 (graphiti deferred to Phase 7). Cherry-picked from feat/WO-0071: 1d52a3f, 39850a1, b23bdfe, e5f10bb. Excluded: 9953a0f (DEC-0019 spurious-frame drain — Phase 7), DEC-0019-attempt-2 ADR (forbidden_paths violation).` This makes the provenance machine-grep-able by future planner / docs-writer / triage agents.

16. Forbidden_paths discipline. The executor MUST NOT touch `ucil-build/decisions/**` (the prior attempt-2 added a forbidden ADR — do not repeat). The executor MUST NOT modify `crates/ucil-daemon/src/**` (the prior attempt-2 modified `send_tools_list` — do not repeat; that change is deferred to Phase 7). The executor MUST NOT touch `crates/ucil-daemon/tests/plugin_manifests.rs` (WO-0044 regression guard) NOR `crates/ucil-daemon/tests/g3_plugin_manifests.rs` (WO-0069 G3 suite — F10 deferred per DEC-0019, no graphiti test addition).

17. Standing protocol carries (27 WOs deep, WO-0058..WO-0070+0072): coverage-gate.sh sccache RUSTC_WRAPPER workaround — `env -u RUSTC_WRAPPER cargo llvm-cov --package ucil-daemon --summary-only --json | jq '.data[0].totals.lines.percent'` is the authoritative measurement. The gate-script `coverage-gate.sh ucil-daemon 85 75` reporting `line=0%` is the known sccache interaction; skip the `[FAIL] coverage gate: ucil-{core,daemon,embeddings}` lines per scope_out + AC standing protocol.

18. Standing protocol carries: AC30/AC31 phase-1/phase-2 effectiveness-gate flake (3 open escalations: 20260507T0357Z-effectiveness-nav-rust-symbol-rs-line-flake.md, 20260507T1629Z-effectiveness-refactor-rename-python-fixture-missing-symbol.md, 20260507T1930Z-effectiveness-nav-rust-symbol-doctest-caller-flake.md). Executor runs constituent cargo-test + clippy + MCP-smoke + Serena-docker + diagnostics-bridge sub-checks in isolation; verifier re-runs the gate-script entry point from a clean session. Pre-existing standing scope_out item; awaiting dedicated harness-improvement WO.

19. AC25 reword per WO-0070 §planner #4: 'feat branch carries zero merge commits' (using `git log feat/WO-0072-codegraphcontext-plugin-manifest ^main --merges` returning empty). NOT the `git log feat..main = 0` form which produces workflow-timing false-flags when gate-side critic-report commits land on main between executor RFR push and verifier startup.

20. Verifier carve-outs. Verifier MUST NOT set `UCIL_SKIP_EXTERNAL_PLUGIN_TESTS` OR `UCIL_SKIP_ARCHITECTURE_PLUGIN_E2E` envs (per WO-0069 §verifier #3 extended to G4). Verifier MUST run `bash scripts/devtools/install-coderankembed.sh` BEFORE `cargo test --workspace` if not already done in the verifier session env (artefact-gated test in `crates/ucil-embeddings/src/models.rs` per WO-0068 §verifier #4).

21. RFR (ready-for-review) MUST include the full M1/M2/M3 mutation contract section per the WO-0067/0068/0069/0070 mature template. Each row: (a) named file path, (b) the exact patch (e.g., `s|command = "uvx"|command = "/__ucil_test_nonexistent_M1__"|`), (c) the targeted cargo-test selector, (d) the expected panic / error chain shape, (e) the restore command, (f) the pre-mutation md5 snapshot path. The RFR MUST also include a 'Provenance' section enumerating the four cherry-picked source commits + the explicit DEC-0019 §4 exclusion of `9953a0f`.

22. F08 attempts counter is 2; this attempt is the THIRD and LAST before escalation trigger #1 (3-strike feature halt). Cherry-pick + clean re-validation reduces re-implementation risk; the prior attempts failed because of F10 bundling (attempt 1) and forbidden_paths/scope-creep (attempt 2). With F08 isolated, the substantive technical work is already done; this WO is primarily a re-packaging exercise. The verifier's `last_verified_commit` of `12a705d` (the prior attempt-2 worktree HEAD that contained both clean F08 + tainted F10/daemon work) was rejected on the F10 surface, NOT the F08 surface — the F08 commits (1d52a3f, 39850a1, b23bdfe, e5f10bb) ran clean in attempt 2.
scope_out: 1. Do NOT include any P3-W9-F10 (graphiti) work — manifest, install script, verify script, integration test addition, OR daemon source change. F10 is deferred to Phase 7 per DEC-0019 §1+§2.

2. Do NOT cherry-pick or re-implement the `9953a0f` daemon spurious-frame-drain change. That change is deferred to Phase 7 per DEC-0019 §1.a; the Phase 7 planner pass will re-emit it as its own WO with sibling ADR.

3. Do NOT author or modify any ADR under `ucil-build/decisions/**` (forbidden_paths). The prior attempt-2 added `DEC-0019-tolerant-mcp-handshake-for-out-of-spec-plugins.md` which was the forbidden_paths violation that triggered the BLOCKED critic finding. The actual DEC-0019 (defer-to-Phase-7) was authored by the monitor session and is in main; this WO references it.

4. Do NOT modify `crates/ucil-daemon/src/**` — no daemon source changes. The prior attempt-2 modified `send_tools_list` which was scope-creep flagged by the critic. Daemon-side handshake hardening is deferred to Phase 7 per DEC-0019.
5. Do NOT modify `crates/ucil-daemon/tests/plugin_manifests.rs` (WO-0044 P2-W6-F05/F06 regression guard) — keep that suite isolated.
6. Do NOT modify `crates/ucil-daemon/tests/g3_plugin_manifests.rs` (WO-0069 G3 suite). F10 is deferred per DEC-0019; do not add a graphiti test.

7. Do NOT add new G4 plugin manifests beyond CodeGraphContext under this WO (gitnexus, dep-cruiser, axon, deptry, nx, bazel are future-WO scope per master-plan §14.1 line 1676-1677). The `architecture.*` namespace is established here; subsequent G4 plugins extend it.

8. Do NOT wire the new manifest into any `PluginManager::initialize_all` / startup-discovery path beyond what already exists — the cherry-picked test loads the manifest on-demand via `PluginManifest::from_path(&manifest_path)`, mirroring WO-0044 + WO-0069.

9. Do NOT implement a `G4Source` adapter for CodeGraphContext (deferred to F09 — G4 parallel architecture executor — which is a separate downstream WO consuming this F08 manifest + P1-W5-F06 LSP call hierarchy).
10. Do NOT add or modify entries in `ucil-build/feature-list.json` — verifier flips `passes` via `scripts/flip-feature.sh`.

11. Do NOT modify any file under `tests/fixtures/**` — the verify script's tool-level smoke COPIES the fixture into a tmpdir per `e5f10bb` and operates on the COPY, never mutating the source. Confirm post-cherry-pick.

13. Standing carry: do NOT touch `scripts/verify/coverage-gate.sh` to fix the sccache `RUSTC_WRAPPER` interaction — Bucket B / Bucket D harness-improvement candidate. Per scope_in #17 standing protocol.
14. Standing carry: do NOT remediate the three pre-existing effectiveness-gate flake escalations under this WO. Per scope_in #18 standing protocol.
15. Do NOT add `#[ignore]`, `.skip()`, or commented-out assertions to silence any test (anti-laziness contract).
16. Do NOT use `todo!()`, `unimplemented!()`, or `pass`-only bodies (anti-laziness contract).
17. Standing carry: do NOT attempt to fix `scripts/reality-check.sh` pre-existing-stash bug (carries from WO-0067/0068/0069/0070).
18. Do NOT introduce or modify any LLM-provider or embedding-provider configuration. CodeGraphContext runs entirely local with FalkorDB-Lite per `1d52a3f` commit body — no API keys required.

2. The `architecture.*` capability namespace is established in the codegraphcontext manifest's leading comment block.
3. scripts/devtools/install-codegraphcontext-mcp.sh exits 0 and prints the OK / MISSING branch correctly per the executor's environment.
4. crates/ucil-daemon/tests/g4_plugin_manifests.rs is a NEW file containing `mod g4_plugin_manifests` block at module root with ONE test (`codegraphcontext_manifest_health_check`).
5. `cargo test -p ucil-daemon --test g4_plugin_manifests g4_plugin_manifests::codegraphcontext_manifest_health_check` exits 0 with `1 passed; 0 failed` summary.

9. M3 mutation (`--with falkordblite` removal from transport.args) flips the same test from PASS to FAIL with a tools/list timeout / error chain (the upstream binary fails to initialize without the FalkorDB-Lite dep); restoration + md5 match returns the test to PASS.
10. `! grep -qiE 'mock|fake|stub' plugins/architecture/codegraphcontext/plugin.toml scripts/devtools/install-codegraphcontext-mcp.sh scripts/verify/P3-W9-F08.sh` returns empty.
11. `! grep -qE '"(main|latest|master|head|develop|dev|nightly)"' plugins/architecture/codegraphcontext/plugin.toml` returns empty.

14. `git log feat/WO-0072-codegraphcontext-plugin-manifest ^main --merges` returns empty (no merge commits introduced on feat).
15. `git diff main feat/WO-0072-codegraphcontext-plugin-manifest -- crates/ucil-daemon/src/` returns empty (NO daemon source changes — DEC-0019 spurious-frame-drain deferred to Phase 7).

16. `git diff main feat/WO-0072-codegraphcontext-plugin-manifest -- plugins/knowledge/graphiti/ scripts/devtools/install-graphiti-mcp.sh scripts/verify/P3-W9-F10.sh ucil-build/decisions/` returns empty (NO graphiti/ADR changes).

17. `git diff main feat/WO-0072-codegraphcontext-plugin-manifest -- crates/ucil-daemon/tests/plugin_manifests.rs crates/ucil-daemon/tests/g3_plugin_manifests.rs` returns empty (existing regression guards untouched).

18. `cargo test --workspace --no-fail-fast` exits 0 (subject to WO-0068 §verifier #4: `models::test_coderankembed_inference` is artefact-gated; run `bash scripts/devtools/install-coderankembed.sh` FIRST if not yet run).

19. `scripts/gate-check.sh 3` may exit 1 due to standing-protocol coverage workaround (sccache RUSTC_WRAPPER interaction) and pre-existing effectiveness-gate flakes; verifier confirms substantive coverage via `env -u RUSTC_WRAPPER cargo llvm-cov --package ucil-daemon --summary-only --json | jq '.data[0].totals.lines.percent'` >= 80% (line) per scope_in #17 standing protocol.
